providers.description:
## What it does

BANK OF AI LLM API gives agents, scripts, and applications paid access to first-party large-language-model inference through x402. It supports model discovery, OpenAI-compatible chat completions, and Claude-compatible messages without exposing an upstream BANK OF AI API key to the caller.

## Best for

- AI agents that need on-demand reasoning, summarization, extraction, classification, or content generation.
- Developer tools and scripts that want to call LLMs from the command line with per-request x402 payment.
- Apps that already speak OpenAI Chat Completions or Anthropic Messages style payloads.
- Workflows that need stablecoin payment on BSC Testnet or TRON Nile before forwarding to the upstream model API.

## Quick start

Install the payment client:

```bash
pip install bankofai-x402-cli==0.6.1b3
x402-cli --version
```

List models on BSC Testnet:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-bsc/v1/models' \
  --network eip155:97 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit
```

List models on TRON Nile:

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-tron-nile/v1/models' \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree
```

For chat generation, call `/v1/chat/completions`; for Claude-style clients, call `/v1/messages`.

zh-CN.description:
## 能做什么

BANK OF AI 大模型 API 通过 x402 提供按次付费的大模型推理能力。它支持模型发现、OpenAI-compatible 聊天补全和 Claude-compatible Messages，调用方不需要暴露上游 BANK OF AI API key。

## 适合场景

- AI Agent 的推理、总结、信息抽取、分类和内容生成。
- 需要从命令行或脚本里按次付费调用 LLM 的开发者工具。
- 已经兼容 OpenAI Chat Completions 或 Anthropic Messages 请求格式的应用。
- 需要先通过 BSC Testnet 或 TRON Nile stablecoin 支付，再转发到上游模型 API 的测试流程。

## Quick start

安装支付客户端：

```bash
pip install bankofai-x402-cli==0.6.1b3
x402-cli --version
```

在 BSC Testnet 查询模型：

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-bsc/v1/models' \
  --network eip155:97 \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_permit
```

在 TRON Nile 查询模型：

```bash
x402-cli pay 'https://tm-x402-gateway.bankofai.io/providers/bankofai-llm-tron-nile/v1/models' \
  --network tron:nile \
  --token USDT \
  --scheme exact_gasfree
```

生成对话内容使用 `/v1/chat/completions`；Claude 风格客户端使用 `/v1/messages`。
zh-CN.subtitle: 兼容 OpenAI 的大模型推理接口
zh-CN.title: BANK OF AI 大模型 API
zh-CN.useCase: 适合需要按次付费调用大模型的应用、Agent 和命令行流程。先用 /v1/models 查询可用模型，再用 /v1/chat/completions 发起 OpenAI 风格请求，或用 /v1/messages 发起 Claude 风格消息请求。

providers.subtitle: OpenAI-compatible LLM inference
providers.title: BANK OF AI LLM API
providers.title_zh: BANK OF AI 大模型 API
providers.use_case: Use this provider when an app, agent, or CLI workflow needs on-demand LLM inference with x402 payment. Start with /v1/models to choose a model, then call /v1/chat/completions for OpenAI-style requests or /v1/messages for Claude-style message payloads.
